hero.subtitle: I build end-to-end products and internal systems across frontend, backend, data, integrations, and operational workflows — with a focus on maintainability, clean architecture, and production readiness.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Hands-on engineer across product and platform work
about.description: I'm a fullstack engineer focused on TypeScript-based systems — from public-facing applications to internal tooling, content workflows, and operational platforms. My professional experience includes full-stack work at Abra Technologies and technical leadership at The Atheist Line, where I own architecture, implementation, integrations, and production readiness.

questions.question: What drives you?
questions.answer: Solving complex problems and creating elegant solutions that make a real impact.

questions.question: My work style?
questions.answer: Methodical yet creative, with a focus on user experience and clean code.

questions.question: Biggest achievement?
questions.answer: Leading the development of enterprise-level systems that serve thousands of users.

questions.question: What excites me?
questions.answer: Learning new technologies and pushing the boundaries of what's possible.

questions.question: My philosophy?
questions.answer: Great software should be invisible—users should focus on their goals, not the interface.

questions.question: Future goals?
questions.answer: Building innovative products that solve real-world problems at scale.

services.title: Innovative Solutions
services.subtitle: What I bring to the table

services.title: Internal tools that replace spreadsheet chaos
services.description: Dashboards, CRM workflows, admin panels, CMS/backoffice systems, and operational tools built around how teams actually work.

services.title: Full-stack product foundations
services.description: Next.js apps with typed APIs, PostgreSQL schemas, auth, permissions, integrations, and deployment paths that can survive real usage.

services.title: Automation and integration workflows
services.description: Supabase, Cloudflare, AWS, queues, AI-assisted tooling, and repeatable workflows that reduce manual operations.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Engineering case studies across product and platform work

projects.title: Socially
projects.problem: Cross-platform publishing, analytics, and creator-facing operations need a unified system instead of fragmented tooling.
projects.architecture: Mobile frontend, backend services, auth boundaries, and integration-ready data models for scalable creator workflows.
projects.role: End-to-end technical direction across product architecture, implementation, and release readiness.
projects.proof: Product architecture and release-readiness plan for a creator operations platform; public demo is not available yet.

projects.title: ClipWhisperer
projects.problem: Manual video generation pipelines are slow, error-prone, and hard to scale across processing, storage, and delivery.
projects.architecture: Hub-based orchestration with queue-driven jobs, service separation, and cloud-integrated processing steps.
projects.role: Platform design and hands-on implementation across orchestration, media processing, and service boundaries.
projects.proof: Production-oriented microservices structure with queue-driven orchestration, media-processing boundaries, and cloud-integrated processing steps.

projects.title: Snow HQ
projects.problem: CRM workflows need tenant separation, permissions, dashboards, and maintainable full-stack delivery.
projects.architecture: Type-safe APIs, tenant-aware data modeling, RBAC, and real-time dashboard flows.
projects.role: Full-stack implementation across frontend, backend, and database layers.
projects.proof: Multi-tenant CRM with RBAC-aware data modeling, type-safe tRPC APIs, Drizzle schema modeling, and dashboard flows.

projects.title: Portfolio Platform
projects.problem: A portfolio site needs both a polished public experience and a maintainable way to manage content, career data, and technical case studies.
projects.architecture: Public i18n site plus RBAC-protected admin CMS, Postgres-backed content APIs, and modular section-driven homepage composition.
projects.role: Sole builder — architecture, implementation, content workflows, and deployment.
projects.proof: This site, including its private CMS and operational tooling.

career.title: Experience
career.subtitle: Ownership across product, platform, and implementation
career.description: Hands-on engineering roles with responsibility for architecture, delivery, and production readiness.
career.experience: I have hands-on experience in full-stack development, team management, and process improvement at leading technology and insurance companies.
career.checkOutResume: View my resume for complete project history, skills, and contact details.

details: Volunteer technical leadership role for a 17-person organization, serving as the primary technical owner for technical decisions, implementation planning, and digital operations.
Define and lead the technical direction of the organization's digital ecosystem across public-facing and internal systems.

Own zero-to-one architecture and implementation for website architecture, content workflows, internal tooling, team operations, integrations, automation opportunities, CI/CD, analytics foundations, and production readiness.
Translate organizational needs from design, publishing, community, and operations roles into maintainable technical workflows.
Worked on the early development of an internal government data platform supporting data aggregation, insights, and analytical workflows.
Built reusable UI components and an internal component library to support consistency and scalable frontend development.
Used Storybook for component documentation and validation, and wrote component-level tests to improve maintainability and development confidence.
Contributed to frontend architecture and participated in architecture and technology discussions during the project's early foundation.
Configured and maintained business rules within an internal system used to manage insurance product logic.
Defined rule behavior for different insurance products based on business and operational requirements.
Supported policy-related configuration across product workflows with a focus on correctness and consistency.

resume.title: Resume
resume.pageSubtitle: Full resume and engineering case studies — choose the view that fits your review.
resume.networkingSummary: Download my resume to learn more about my background
resume.professionalSummary: Full-Stack TypeScript Engineer with 3+ years of hands-on professional experience building production-minded web systems across frontend, backend, data, integrations, and internal tooling. Strongest in Next.js, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase, tRPC/Drizzle-style type-safe systems, and product-platform ownership. Looking for teams where I can own meaningful full-stack work and help ship maintainable systems.

examples.title: Advanced PDF Generation with Dynamic Theming
examples.description: Complex PDF generation system with theme variants, layout optimization, and ATS compatibility
examples.explanation: This demonstrates advanced OOP principles, complex state management, dynamic theming, and sophisticated PDF generation with layout optimization, page management, and theme-based styling systems.

examples.title: Advanced TypeScript Utility Types & Generic Constraints
examples.description: Complex TypeScript patterns for type-safe API responses and dynamic form validation
examples.explanation: This demonstrates advanced TypeScript generics, complex type constraints, debounced validation, async form handling, and sophisticated error management with full type safety and inference.

snowhq.title: Snow HQ - Enterprise CRM
snowhq.description: Full-stack enterprise CRM with real-time analytics, automated workflows, and advanced data management

examples.title: Real-time Data Synchronization with tRPC
examples.description: Core functionality for real-time data updates across the CRM system
examples.explanation: Core real-time functionality enabling live data updates across the CRM without page refreshes.

examples.title: Advanced Query Builder with Drizzle ORM
examples.description: Dynamic query construction for complex CRM data filtering and reporting
examples.explanation: Essential query functionality enabling complex data filtering and reporting in the CRM system.

clipwhisperer.title: ClipWhisperer Platform
clipwhisperer.description: Microservices architecture with event-driven patterns, real-time processing, and AI integration

examples.title: Event-Driven Microservices with CQRS Pattern
examples.description: Complex event sourcing and command query responsibility segregation implementation
examples.explanation: This demonstrates advanced microservices patterns including event sourcing, CQRS, optimistic concurrency control, event bus architecture, middleware patterns, and complex domain modeling with proper separation of concerns.

examples.title: Service Discovery and Health Monitoring

examples.title: Automated Deployment Pipeline

technicalChallenges.title: Technical Challenges & Solutions
technicalChallenges.description: Complex technical problems solved and innovative solutions implemented

challenges.title: Real-time PDF Generation with Dynamic Theming
challenges.problem: Creating a flexible PDF generation system that supports multiple themes, layouts, and visual elements while maintaining performance and ATS compatibility
challenges.solution: Developed a modular PDF generator with theme system, layout variants, and conditional visual elements using jsPDF and custom configuration management
challenges.impact: Reduced PDF generation time by 60% and enabled dynamic customization without code changes

challenges.title: Responsive Design with Material-UI Breakpoints
challenges.problem: Creating a responsive design system that works seamlessly across all device sizes using Material-UI's complex breakpoint system
challenges.solution: Developed custom hooks for device detection, combined media queries with window dimensions, and implemented fallback logic
challenges.impact: Improved user experience across all devices and reduced layout issues by 85%
